title: Create Table
description: Define a new table structure with specified column names, data types, and primary keys.
problemStatement:
Build from scratch! Create a table named `projects` with an `id` (INTEGER, PRIMARY KEY) and a `name` (TEXT).

**Requirement:** Use the `CREATE TABLE` statement.
hints: Primary keys ensure that every record in your table is unique and easily identifiable.
expectedOutput: A new projects table in the database
